name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl and beat for 2 minutes.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 2-pound coffee can.
3. Place the can in the Crock-Pot.
4. Cover the top of the can with 8 paper towels.
5. Bake on High for 2 to 3 hours.
